info.name: The Fortune Tech API
info.description: API collection for The Fortune Tech backend services. This collection includes all public and protected endpoints for managing services, portfolio, technologies, testimonials, careers, CMS, and user management. Verified for compliance with Engineering Principles.

formdata.value: Complete web development from idea to launch.
We specialize in building modern, scalable, and secure web applications.
Professional website development services with AI
Large scale e-commerce solution with AI-driven recommendations.
Great team to work with! They delivered beyond our expectations.
